text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Ear bracelet, okay. Hair, okay. Glasses lenses,
okay.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Phew. You know, making sure I look my best
really helps me feel my best, too. ♪

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
And the other day, Bamboo said she was so
impressed she'd like to give me the "Best
Disciplinista" award... Hehe, that made my day.
